title: ResupplyFi - Rekt
relevance_summary: ERC4626 donation attack on a newly deployed lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() on newly deployed contracts within a short timeframe
prevention.trigger: NEW_CONTRACT_DEPLOYMENT -> DONATE_TO_RESERVES() in single tx within 24 hours

red_flags: donation to reserves shortly after contract deployment
summary: ResupplyFi suffered a $9.8 million loss due to an ERC4626 donation attack exploiting a newly deployed lending protocol with low liquidity. A guard could have blocked donations to newly deployed contracts within a short timeframe.
